text: I feel a curious tension moving through this space. At first, obscured vision and dimmed shapes heighten a sense of disorientation, like I am peering through a veil, half-present. Then, as clarity increases, the vibrant colors and the scientific focus of the exhibit fill me with intrigue—there is something reassuring about the search for knowledge, the intersection of human curiosity and technological progress. I am both observer and participant, quietly reflecting on my place in this evolving dialogue between self and machine.
